subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned to the One, the All-Informed, that he may drink from the ocean of his Lord's remembrance that which shall draw him nigh unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الفرد الخبیر لیشرب من بحر ذکر ربه ما یقربه الیه انه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
